settings.text:
At Berkeley Life, we stand firmly rooted in science. Our products are formulated using rigorously researched, clinically tested ingredients, and we take it a step further by conducting our own clinical trials to ensure our formulas deliver real results. By partnering with experts and continually investing in research, we uphold the highest standards of efficacy.

Explore our research to see the science driving real results.

settings.heading: Nitric Oxide and Healthy Blood Pressure
settings.content: Urolithin A (Mitopure®), administered topically, significantly reduces wrinkles, improves skin hydration, and decreases UV-induced erythema. It up-regulates collagen synthesis pathways, inhibits collagen degradation, and enhances mitophagy and autophagy in skin cells. These results support the use of Urolithin A to manage skin health and protect against skin aging and UVB-mediated photodamage.

settings.text: Even if you’re eating right, exercising, and taking supplements, low N.O. levels can hold you back from feeling the full benefits. Healthy blood flow sets the foundation for everything else to work at its best, so you truly feel the results.
